description: Population seeking Zhunti (Cundi) Buddha Mother's wish-fulfillment for themselves, loved ones, and the world

targets.name: Those Praying for Loved Ones
targets.description: Beings who pray for the wellbeing, health, safety, and happiness of their family members and loved ones
targets.intention: May Zhunti Buddha Mother hear and fulfill every sincere prayer offered for another's welfare, may families be blessed with harmony and wellbeing

additional_data.zhunti_quality: wish-fulfilling mother of all buddhas of the three times

targets.name: Students Seeking Wisdom and Success
targets.description: Students of all ages and traditions seeking wisdom, understanding, discernment, and success in their studies
targets.intention: May all sincere students be blessed with clarity of mind, retentive memory, depth of insight, and accomplishment in their studies

targets.name: Those Seeking Employment
targets.description: Beings seeking right livelihood - meaningful work that supports themselves, their families, and benefits others
targets.intention: May all those seeking work find right livelihood aligned with their gifts, may they be free from financial fear, may their work benefit beings

additional_data.estimated_count: 400+ million unemployed globally, many more underemployed

targets.name: Couples Hoping for Children
targets.description: Couples and individuals longing to conceive and welcome children into their lives
targets.intention: May Zhunti Buddha Mother, mother of all buddhas, bless those longing for children, may their wish be fulfilled in ways that bring joy and dharma connection

additional_data.estimated_count: 1 in 6 people globally affected by infertility

targets.name: Environmental Healing - Forests
targets.description: The world's forests suffering from deforestation, fires, disease, and climate stress - lungs of the planet
targets.intention: May Zhunti's blessing heal and protect all forests, may reforestation flourish, may the trees, animals, and ecosystems thrive in balance

additional_data.estimated_count: 10 million hectares of forest lost annually

targets.name: Environmental Healing - Oceans
targets.description: The world's oceans suffering from pollution, acidification, overfishing, and warming
targets.intention: May the oceans be purified of pollution, may marine life recover, may the waters that sustain all life on Earth be healed and protected

targets.name: Environmental Healing - Atmosphere
targets.description: The atmosphere suffering from greenhouse gas accumulation, pollution, and climate disruption
targets.intention: May the atmosphere be purified, may humanity awaken to right relationship with Earth's climate, may balance be restored for the benefit of all beings

targets.name: Peacemakers and Their Work
targets.description: Those dedicating their lives to peacebuilding, reconciliation, environmental activism, and social justice - may their wishes for a better world be fulfilled
targets.intention: May Zhunti Buddha Mother fulfill the aspirations of all who work selflessly for peace, justice, and the healing of the world
